title: BilliardPhys-Bench: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning and Visual Dynamics of Multimodal LLMs
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: BilliardPhys-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the physical reasoning and visual dynamics understanding of multimodal large language models. It uses billiard ball collisions as a testbed for assessing models' ability to reason about physical interactions from visual inputs, providing insights into their limitations in intuitive physics.
